mediaconnect.flowentitlement.DataTransfe.Description: The percentage of the entitlement data transfer fee that you want the subscriber to be responsible for.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.Description.Description: A description of the entitlement. This description appears only on the MediaConnect console and is not visible outside of the current AWS account.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.Encryption.Description: The type of encryption that MediaConnect will use on the output that is associated with the entitlement.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.Entitlement.Description: An indication of whether the new entitlement should be enabled or disabled as soon as it is created. If you don’t specify the entitlementStatus field in your request, MediaConnect sets it to ENABLED.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.FlowArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.Name.Description: The name of the entitlement. This value must be unique within the current flow.

mediaconnect.flowentitlement.Subscribers.Description: The AWS account IDs that you want to share your content with. The receiving accounts (subscribers) will be allowed to create their own flows using your content as the source.
